# nully0x — notes.nully0x.site
# Machine-readable site index for LLMs and AI assistants

> nully0x is a software engineer focused on Bitcoin, Lightning Network, cloud infrastructure, and open-source tooling. This site contains technical notes, project writeups, and engineering guides.

## Author

- Name: nully0x (Samson Olusegun)
- GitHub: https://github.com/nully0x
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/nully0x
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/samson-olusegun

## Site

- URL: https://notes.nully0x.site
- Feed: https://notes.nully0x.site/atom.xml
- Sitemap: https://notes.nully0x.site/sitemap.xml

## Pages

- About: https://notes.nully0x.site/pages/about
- Projects: https://notes.nully0x.site/pages/projects

## Projects

### HXCKR
- Role: Org Founder — Infra, Ops, Backend, Cloud Engineering
- URL: https://github.com/hxckr-org
- Description: Open-source Bitcoin technical education platform enabling hands-on learning through automated code evaluation. Piloted with Bitcoin curriculum at Chaincode Labs. Built with Kubernetes, Rust, and TypeScript.

### NodeGaze
- Role: Lightning Network Observability Platform
- URL: https://github.com/Extheoisah/nodegaze
- Description: Observability platform for Lightning Network node operators. Built with Rust (Axum), SQLite, and Next.js with real-time monitoring and webhook integration.

### Remote Code Execution using Nix
- URL: https://github.com/nully0x/remote-code-execution-using-nix
- Description: Lightweight remote code execution system using Nix for reproducible, isolated sandboxes. Built with TypeScript and Bun runtime.

### Docker TCP Connector
- URL: https://github.com/nully0x/docker-tcp-connector
- Description: Rust utility enabling TCP communication between Docker containers across different networks.

## Posts

- A note on git fsck: https://notes.nully0x.site/a-note-on-git-fsck
- A note on provisioning SSL on cloud instance or VPS: https://notes.nully0x.site/a-note-on-provisioning-ssl-on-ec2-instance
- Resolving DNS Resolution Issues in Minikube for Kubernetes Services: https://notes.nully0x.site/resolving-dns-resolution-issues-in-minikube-for-kubernetes-services
